name: Tian Jin Bohai Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tian Jin Bohai Chemical Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a card manufacturer in China. The company is involved in relative implement and application system, securities printing, and packing production activities. It offers bank, telecom, social, integrate circuit (IC), contact IC, and contactless IC cards. The company also provides SMT; financial equipment; IC card bus toll collectors; IC card taximeters; online type writing information and charging money machines; contactless hand holding POS toll collectors; offline information writing and money charging machines; parking lot IC blocking equipment and toll collectors; IC card toll collectors of park tickets; smart IC card toll collectors of small amount; key machines for infrared data gathering; data reclaiming multiplexers; smart ticket boxes; and machines with roll memory. In addition, it offers electronic tax controlling and money collecting machines; outside hanging mode Chinese tax controlling machines; financial tax control gathering machines; and city all-purpose card systems, system solutions, and social security management systems. The company's cards are used in finance, insurance, medicine, transportation, and communication industries. It also exports its cards to approximately 40 countries and regions, including Japan, Hong Kong, Sri Lanka, Indian, Pakistan, Vietnam, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Turkey, the United Arab Emirates, Lebanon, Israel, Russia, Finland, the Netherlands, Ireland, Switzerland, Bulgaria, the United States, Canada, Mexico, Uruguay, Australia, New Zealand, Nigeria, Panama, South Africa, Iran, Ukraine, Armenia, and Denmark. The company was formerly known as Tianjin Global Magnetic Card Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tian Jin Bohai Chemical Co.,Ltd. in February 2021. Tian Jin Bohai Chemical Co.,Ltd. is based in Tianjin, China.
